data.title: Russia Side-Stepping Western Sanctions by Trading Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and USDT for Oil: Report
data.description:
Russia is using cryptocurrencies in oil transactions with India and China, according to a new Reuters report. Citing “four sources with direct knowledge of the matter,” the new report claims that some Russian oil companies are using Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and USDT to ease the conversion of Indian rupees and Chinese yuan to Russian […]

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/russia-side-stepping-western-sanctions-by-trading-bitcoin-btc-ethereum-eth-and-usdt-for-oil-report/

data.title: BlackRock now holds over 567,000 BTC, valued at over $47 billion
data.description:
BlackRock, the world’s largest asset manager with approximately $11.6 trillion in assets under management, currently holds over 567,000 Bitcoin (BTC), valued at over $47.8 billion — making the asset manager one of the largest holders of BTC in the world.According to Arkham Intelligence, the asset manager’s most recent BTC acquisition occurred on March 14 when a Coinbase Prime wallet...
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/blackrock-holds-47-billion-bitcoin?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: SEC Mulls Whether XRP Is a Commodity Amid Lawsuit-Ending Negotiations With Ripple: Report
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is reportedly mulling whether the payments altcoin XRP could qualify as a commodity. Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett, citing two anonymous “well-placed sources,” reported earlier this week that the SEC’s lawsuit against Ripple appears to be wrapping up. The lawsuit might have been resolved by now, but Ripple’s legal […]

source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/14/sec-mulls-whether-xrp-is-a-commodity-amid-lawsuit-ending-negotiations-with-ripple-report/

data.title: Growth in Bitcoin and stablecoin adoption could accelerate dedollarization
data.description:
The US dollar has long reigned as the world’s primary reserve currency and the default choice for global trade and international transactions. But its dominance is now facing growing scrutiny as shifting geopolitical and economic forces—and concerns over the potential weaponization of the greenback—push more countries to accelerate efforts to loosen their dependence on the dollar.By almost...

data.title: Ukraine Ready to Sign Mineral Resource Agreement with U.S.
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ukraine's Deputy Prime Minister Stefanishyna announced that Ukraine is prepared to sign a mineral resource framework agreement with the United States. She noted that the negotiations on the text of the agreement have been completed. However, the U.S. has not yet decided on the timing or conditions for signing the agreement.

data.title: Zelensky Urges U.S. Action as Putin Proposes Ceasefire Conditions
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has stated that Russian leader Vladimir Putin has proposed additional conditions for a ceasefire, indicating a lack of genuine intent to halt hostilities. Zelensky emphasized the importance of not allowing the conflict to prolong and called on the United States to take decisive measures to assist Ukraine. He urged the U.S. to exert pressure on Russia and take firm actions to prevent the ongoing conflict from continuing for years.
